preconditions: Valid credentials available for testing: Username = Admin and Password = admin123

testCases.title: Verify login page displays all required login controls and labels
steps: Open the login page URL in the browser
Observe the login form area without entering any data
testCases.expectedResult: Login page heading 'Login' is visible. Username textbox, password textbox, Login button, and Forgot your password? link are displayed, enabled, and accessible for interaction.

testCases.title: Verify successful login using valid username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and redirected to URL https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/dashboard/index. Dashboard page is displayed and login form is no longer visible.

testCases.title: Verify successful login when credentials are pasted into the fields
steps: Copy and paste 'Admin' into the username textbox
Copy and paste 'admin123' into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted values are accepted without truncation or formatting issues and user is redirected successfully to the dashboard URL after clicking Login.

testCases.title: Verify login can be submitted using Enter key from password field
steps: Press the Enter key while focused on the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login form is submitted through keyboard interaction and user is redirected to the dashboard page without clicking the Login button.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
testCases.expectedResult: User remains on the login page, dashboard URL is not opened, and 'Invalid credentials' message is displayed below or near the login form.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and invalid password
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, user stays on the login page, and visible 'Invalid credentials' message is displayed without redirecting to dashboard.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with both invalid username and invalid password
testCases.expectedResult: Login attempt is rejected, 'Invalid credentials' message is displayed, login form remains visible, and dashboard page is not loaded.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Required validation messages are displayed for both username and password fields. Login form is not submitted and user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when username is empty and password is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Required validation message is displayed for the username field only and authentication does not proceed.

testCases.title: Verify required validation when password is empty and username is entered
testCases.expectedResult: Required validation message is displayed for the password field only and user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with leading and trailing spaces in username field
testCases.expectedResult: Application handles leading and trailing spaces consistently by either trimming the username and authenticating successfully or rejecting the login with visible validation or invalid credential feedback. No broken UI or application error is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when only whitespace is entered in username and password fields
steps: Enter only spaces into the username textbox
Enter only spaces into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User is not authenticated, dashboard page is not opened, and application displays either Required validation messages or Invalid credentials message while keeping the login form visible.

testCases.title: Verify password characters remain masked while typing
testCases.expectedResult: Password field masks entered characters and the actual password text is not readable on screen while typing.

testCases.title: Verify forgot password link navigates to password recovery page
testCases.expectedResult: User is redirected from the login page to the password recovery workflow page and the login form is no longer the active screen.

testCases.title: Verify keyboard Tab navigation moves focus through login controls in sequence
steps: Press the Tab key repeatedly to navigate through interactive controls
testCases.expectedResult: Keyboard focus moves sequentially through username textbox, password textbox, Login button, and Forgot your password? link in a usable navigation order. Focused controls are visibly active and operable using keyboard input.

testCases.title: Verify login is case-sensitive for username credentials
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails because username case does not match the valid credential. 'Invalid credentials' message is displayed and dashboard page is not opened.

testCases.title: Verify login is case-sensitive for password credentials
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails because password case does not match the valid credential. 'Invalid credentials' message is displayed and user remains on the login page.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior with very long username and password values
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding normal credential length into the username textbox
Enter a very long string exceeding normal credential length into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application handles oversized input without UI distortion, browser crash, or server error. User is not authenticated and login page remains functional after submission.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when special characters are entered in username and password fields
steps: Enter special characters into the username textbox
Enter special characters into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected, login page remains displayed, and visible invalid credential feedback is shown without application crash or script error.

testCases.title: Verify repeated clicking on Login button with valid credentials does not create duplicate login actions
steps: Rapidly click the Login button multiple times
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes only a single authenticated session, redirects user once to the dashboard page, and no duplicate requests, UI freezes, or error messages are visible.

testCases.title: Verify logout returns authenticated user back to login page
testCases.expectedResult: Authenticated session is terminated, user is redirected to the login page URL, and username textbox, password textbox, and Login button are visible again.

testCases.title: Verify invalid credential message disappears after successful login retry
steps: Verify the invalid credentials message is displayed
testCases.expectedResult: Previous invalid credentials message is cleared after successful authentication and user is redirected to the dashboard page successfully.

testCases.title: Verify browser refresh on login page retains stable login form state
testCases.expectedResult: Login page reloads successfully and username textbox, password textbox, Login button, and Forgot your password? link remain visible, enabled, and usable after refresh.

testCases.title: Verify login button is clickable and responsive on page load
steps: Observe the Login button before entering any data
testCases.expectedResult: Login button is visible and clickable on page load. Clicking without credentials triggers required field validation messages without page crash or unresponsive behavior.
